stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA continues to dominate AI chip demand with rumors of a $30B OpenAI investment aligning with IPO timing and strong sector momentum as top S&P gainer +2.1%. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure spending boosting tech GDP contribution. Market psychology: FOMO on AI leaders amid rotation into risk assets. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 AI boom post-ChatGPT launch. Analogies: Like oil majors during shale revolution (supply constrained demand surge); rocket fuel for data centers akin to gold rush infrastructure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive news on OpenAI ties, JPM PT raise to $265; X semantic search reveals buy signals (8.1/10 score), revenue acceleration, institutional flows, neutral-to-bullish TA near resistance. Sentiment shift upward with semis broadly up.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 5-8% gains targeting $190 on breakout above $184 resistance; momentum continuation.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if fails $180 support, potential 3% drop to $176, but low conviction amid bullish trend.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation premium, AI capex slowdown, broader market rotation out of tech.

stocks.justification: Strong alignment of news, X sentiment (mostly buy), historical AI momentum, high volume confirms shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Broadcom Q1 FY26 earnings beat with record $19.31B revenue, AI semis +106% YoY, Q2 guide $22B. Econ impl: Validates AI hardware supercycle, $100B+ TAM. Psych: Relief post-underwhelm fears, analyst upgrades. Historical: Parallels Cisco during dot-com (networking boom). Analogies: Like Intel in PC era ramp; AI accelerators as picks-and-shovels for gold rush.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat headlines, X posts positive reaction, gap-and-go setups, 26/28 analysts Buy avg PT $458 (40%+ upside), AI revenue doubling. Sentiment shift post-earnings positive despite prior ROI concerns.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting $350-365 on breakout, 8-10% upside; strong analyst support.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short below $314 support for 5% drop if guidance digestion leads to profit-taking.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High PE, competition in AI networking, macro slowdown in capex.

stocks.justification: Earnings beat with raised guides, unanimous analyst buys, X bullish TA and flows confirm sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: ODFL breaks above $208.45 extending intermediate uptrend, new 52w high despite Feb revenue -3.3% YoY. Econ: Signals trucking recovery amid industrial rebound. Psych: Breakout attracts momentum chasers. Historical: Like 2021 logistics surge post-COVID. Analogies: Truck as economy's heartbeat accelerating; dam breaking after freight winter.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Tech Talk highlights breakout; operating metrics update shows resilience. No strong X data but price action confirms sentiment shift upward in transports.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 4-6% to $225 on continued breakout; sector rotation play.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short on revenue weakness confirmation, 5% to $200 support.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Freight volume slowdown, fuel costs, economic softening.

stocks.justification: Clear breakout TA, but revenue dip tempers; limited recent sentiment data.

stocks.impact_theory: Pfizer top S&P loser -1.3% amid obesity drug delays, policy risks on vaccines. Econ: Highlights pharma pricing pressures, R&D ROI uncertainty. Psych: Disappointment in post-COVID pivot. Historical: Similar to 2019 patent cliffs. Analogies: Ship missing tide (GLP-1 wave); marathon runner hitting wall.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: S&P movers list loser; X posts bearish on obesity progress, policy volatility, overbought TA. Sentiment shift downward post-rally.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long on dips to $25 for dividend yield, 5% rebound if oncology wins.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short targeting $24 support, 6-8% downside on continued headwinds.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Pipeline surprises, M&A catalysts, undervaluation bounce.

stocks.justification: Consistent bearish X analysis, but low valuation and dividends provide floor.

stocks.impact_theory: ImmunityBio plunges -10% top loser, high volume suggests negative catalyst like earnings preview or trial data miss. Econ: Biotech volatility impacts sector funding. Psych: Fear of dilution/failure. Historical: Biotech crashes on FDA delays. Analogies: Rollercoaster biotech bet; house of cards on trial winds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo lists as top loser; elevated volume, no positive news, prior downtrends noted. Sharp sentiment shift negative.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: High-risk long below $8 for 15% bounce on oversold.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Binary biotech events, short squeeze on volume.

stocks.justification: Price action strong bearish, but sparse news/X data limits conviction.
